news.summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after WTI crude crashed 4.7% to $92.94 on Iran-US peace deal progress, providing direct relief to airlines, hotels, cruise lines, and online travel agents. news.title: Memory chip prices to remain high as Micron surges, expert says
news.summary:
STORY: "As this ongoing buildout of artificial intelligence infrastructure has happened," prices for memory chips have risen, Stucky said.

Equating the hike in memory chip prices to the rise of oil prices, Stucky said, "this would be the equivalent of oil markets moving from $60 a barrel to north of $300 a barrel."
